document_summary: Article from the Social Science Network (sinoss) about Liu's book 'Age Theory: Social Time in Social Space' (published 2007). The book fills a gap in age variable research, has been adopted as required reading at multiple universities including Communication University of China and PKU, used by international market research firms (RI, IPSOS, INTAGE), and cited by numerous scholars. The book's methods have been applied by CCTV, P&G, Tencent, Baidu, Shell and others.

snippets.text: # Dehuan Liu: Age Theory: Social Time in Social Space
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Title of article about Liu's book on the Social Science Network, an official academic platform.

snippets.text: The age variable is an indispensable variable in the data analysis of social research, and probably all researchers will not lose this variable in the data analysis of social research, but few papers and monographs are devoted to the study of the age variable. How to analyze the age variable, especially how to find the support of previous research results and related theories based on the data analysis, is a very important but often neglected issue to improve the data analysis. There have been some explorations in this area in foreign countries, but they are all about specific models, and there is no comprehensive work on this topic. The book "Age Theory" fills this gap.
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Establishes that Liu's Age Theory fills a gap in both domestic and international scholarship on age variable analysis.

snippets.text: Since the book is focused on the theoretical significance of a time variable like age in social space and the method of data analysis, it has become one of the reference books for research and analysis methods in communication and other disciplines in China upon its publication, and the social response has been excellent. So far, the book has become one of the required readings assigned by Prof. Huixin Ke and Prof. Hao Shen in the Communication Research Methods class at the Communication University of China, as well as in the Media Analysis and Advanced Statistics classes at the School of Journalism and Communication of Peking University. In addition, the content of this book has been applied in teaching, which had demonstrated excellent teaching results. With the application of the ideas of the model in Age Theory, the papers of master students Hui Zhang, Beibei Zhang and Lili Jiang won the honor of Excellent Master Papers, the papers of Jingjin Jiang, Shengxi Chen and Lingfei Wu won the third prize, third prize and excellent prize in the Procter & Gamble Market Research Paper Award, respectively, and the papers of Jing Jing, Tian Tian and other students won the first prize in Challenge Cup of Peking University. After the publication, the Age Theory has been listed as analysis and reference materials for quantitative researches by international market research enterprises like RI, IPSOS, INTAGE, etc.
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Demonstrates broad academic and industry impact: required reading at multiple universities, student awards based on the model, adopted by international research firms RI, IPSOS, INTAGE.

snippets.text: CCTV, Guangdong TV, Hainan TV, and CCTV Market Research Company (CTR), CCTV- Sofres Company (CSM), IPSOS, GFK, CMMR, P&G, Tencent, Baidu, Shell have arranged special explanations for contents in this book, leading to exceptional social benefits.
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Major corporations including CCTV, P&G, Tencent, Baidu, Shell, IPSOS, GFK adopted Age Theory methods, demonstrating commercial impact.
